excerpt:
<details open>

server : optimize get_token_probabilities (#24796)

Use std::partial_sort to order only the requested top-n tokens instead
of the full vocabulary

    logprobs sort: vocab=128000 n_top=0 iters=100
    full    sort:   8555.6 us/op
    partial sort:    704.3 us/op

Signed-off-by: Adrien Gallouët <angt@huggingface.co>

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)
- macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) [DISABLED](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/pull/23780)
- [macOS Intel (x64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-bin-macos-x64.tar.gz)
- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**
- [Ubuntu x64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu arm64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-bin-ubuntu-arm64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9731/llama-b9731-bin-ubuntu-s390x.tar.g
